title: Oskar vs. the Red Dragon
genre: Top-down melee dungeon crawler with a single linear cave route ending in a multi-phase dragon boss.
desc: You are Oskar — a dwarf so small the dragon should swallow him whole — and you walk into the dragon's cave anyway, big sword drawn and red cape flying, to stop it before it breaks out and burns the world.
transcript: We are playing as Oskar, a dwarf fighter, and he has a really big sword and an awesome red cape. There is a BIG RED DRAGON stuck in a cave and it is trying to break out. Oskar has to stop it or it will fly around burning everything and that would be really bad. We navigate through the cave fighting skeletons along the way and there are healing potions if Oskar needs them. Then we reach the dragon and we fight it head on. The dragon is huge. Oskar is really awesome.
